# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer # or Ingress if you want to use an ingress controller like Nginx, Traefik etc.  
  selector:
    app: gateway    
---      
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1       
kind: Ingress         
metadata:          
 name: api-gateway         # Name of the ingress resource           
 annotations:            
   kubernetes.io/ingress.class: nginx  # Use NGINX as reverse proxy, you can use any other like Traefik or HAProxy etc   
spec:         
 rules:          
 - host: api-gateway     # FQDN of the Ingress resource (api-gateway)           
   http:            
     paths:              
       - pathType: ImplementationSpecific 
         path: "/*"             
         backend:               
           serviceName: microservice1   
           servicePort: 80          # Port of the Microservices. You can change it according to your needs
